title: (Bullish Signal) BCC enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 03, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that BCC's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 63 similar cases where BCC's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 54 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 86%. Current price $49.47 crossed the resistance line at $50.40 and is trading between $50.40 resistance and $48.54 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 01/29/21 - 03/03/21, the price experienced a +9% Uptrend. During the week of 02/24/21 - 03/03/21, the stock enjoyed a +1% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/oi5xyi1xa2l61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=d9bd1f5bef63a5b4fba009f1214396669c762361

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for BCC just turned positive on March 02, 2021. Looking at past instances where BCC's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 38 of 46 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

BCC moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 24, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for BCC crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 09, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

Following a +5.49% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BCC advanced for three days, in 251 of 319 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

BCC may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 213 of 290 cases where BCC Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 73%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9667906-boise-cascade-bcc-51-91-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-mar-03-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
